cases.title: slugify should collapse consecutive spaces into one dash
cases.reason: Replacing /  /g with /\s+/g collapses any run of whitespace into a single dash, correctly handling both test cases minimally.

cases.title: Add a clamp(n, min, max) helper
cases.reason: The diff adds and exports a correct, minimal clamp implementation that satisfies all the specified cases.

cases.title: parseQueryString should URL-decode values and handle valueless keys
cases.reason: The fix decodes values with decodeURIComponent and maps valueless keys to empty string, exactly matching the ticket requirements with a minimal change.

cases.title: Add a capitalize(str) helper
cases.reason: The diff adds and exports a correct capitalize function handling all specified cases including empty string.

cases.title: User reports add(2, 2) should equal 5
cases.reason: No previously-failing test was turned green — the change doesn't actually close the ticket.
